== Project Notes

=== Extension overview

QRLite is a MediaWiki extension that generates QR Codes in SVG or PNG format
on-the-fly. It is lightweight: it does not upload or manage images within
MediaWiki. The core logic lives in `src/QRLiteFunctions.php` and
`src/QRLiteHooks.php`. There are no JavaScript or CSS assets beyond what
MediaWiki provides.
